controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks
- Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks as defined under clause (ja) of banking regulation act, 1949 (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' an
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks as defined under
clause (ja) of Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (hereinafter collectively referred to
as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks as defined under clause (ja) of banking regulation act, 1949 (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' an

controls.control_objective: To ensure also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as prescribed
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset
classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as
prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, in addition to these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as prescribed

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them below: (1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of the crops raised, as determined by
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of the
crops raised, as determined by the State Level Bankers' Committee
(SLBC) in each State;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them below: (1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of the crops raised, as determined by

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean an asset which has remained in the substandard category for a period of twelve months
controls.control_description:
(2) 'doubtful asset' shall mean an asset which has remained in the
substandard category for a period of twelve months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean an asset which has remained in the substandard category for a period of twelve months

controls.control_objective: To ensure include all funded and non-funded exposures (including underwriting and similar commitments)
controls.control_description:
Here too, as
in the case of sub-standard assets rescheduling does not entitle a bank
to upgrade the quality of an advance automatically
(3) 'exposure' shall include all funded and non-funded exposures (including
underwriting and similar commitments).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include all funded and non-funded exposures (including underwriting and similar commitments)

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean crops with crop season longer than one year
controls.control_description:
(4) 'long duration crops' shall mean crops with crop season longer than one
year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean crops with crop season longer than one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean an asset where loss has been identified by a bank or internal or external auditors or the inspection conducted by nabard, but the amount has not
controls.control_description:
(5) 'loss asset' shall mean an asset where loss has been identified by a bank
or internal or external auditors or the inspection conducted by NABARD,
but the amount has not been written off wholly or partly by the bank;.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean an asset where loss has been identified by a bank or internal or external auditors or the inspection conducted by nabard, but the amount has not

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean an asset, including a leased asset, which has ceased to generate income for a bank
controls.control_description:
(6) 'non-performing asset' shall mean an asset, including a leased asset,
which has ceased to generate income for a bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean an asset, including a leased asset, which has ceased to generate income for a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as 'out of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied: explanation 1: 'previous 90 days period' referred to in sub- paragraph
controls.control_description:
(7) 'out of order status' - a cash credit / overdraft (CC / OD) account shall be
treated as 'out of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied:
Explanation 1: 'Previous 90 days period' referred to in sub-
paragraph (iii) above shall be inclusive of the day for which the day-
end process is being run.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as 'out of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied: explanation 1: 'previous 90 days period' referred to in sub- paragraph

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including those not meant for business purpose and / or which entail inte
controls.control_description:
Explanation 2: The definition of 'out of order' shall be applicable to
all credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including
those not meant for business purpose and / or which entail interest
repayments as the only credits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including those not meant for business purpose and / or which entail inte

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank
controls.control_description:
(8) 'overdue' status - any amount due to a bank under any credit facility shall
be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the ratio of provisioning to gross non-performing assets and indicates the extent of funds kept aside to cover loan losses
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the ratio of provisioning to gross non-performing assets and indicates the extent of funds kept aside to cover loan losses

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean tangible security properly charged to the bank and will not include intangible securities like guarantees (including state government guarantees)
controls.control_description:
(10) 'security' shall mean tangible security properly charged to the bank and
will not include intangible securities like guarantees (including State
government guarantees), comfort letters, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean tangible security properly charged to the bank and will not include intangible securities like guarantees (including state government guarantees)

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean crops which are not "long duration" crops
controls.control_description:
(11) 'short duration crops' shall mean crops which are not "long duration"
crops;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean crops which are not "long duration" crops

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean an asset, which has remained npa for a period less than or equal to twelve months
controls.control_description:
(12) 'substandard asset' shall mean an asset, which has remained NPA for a
period less than or equal to twelve months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean an asset, which has remained npa for a period less than or equal to twelve months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in terms of the circular fidd
controls.control_description:
The definitions of the terms 'Micro Enterprises', 'Small Enterprises', and 'Medium
Enterprises' shall be in terms of the circular FIDD.MSME &
NFS.BC.No.3/06.02.31/2020-21 dated July 2, 2020 on 'Credit flow to Micro,
Small and Medium Enterprises Sector' as updated from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in terms of the circular fidd

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the companies ac
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Companies Act, 2013, or any statutory
modification or re-enactment thereto or other regulations issued by the Reserve
Bank or the Glossary of Terms published by the Reserve Bank or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the companies ac

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after december 31, 2021: (1) the exact due dates for repayment of a lo
controls.control_description:
A bank shall comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans
sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021:
(1) The exact due dates for repayment of a loan, frequency of repayment,
breakup between principal and interest, examples of dates of
classification as special mention account (SMA) / non-performing asset
(NPA), etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after december 31, 2021: (1) the exact due dates for repayment of a lo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly specified in the loan agreement
controls.control_description: shall be clearly specified in the loan agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly specified in the loan agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction and also at the time of subsequent changes
controls.control_description:
(2) The borrower shall be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction
and also at the time of subsequent changes, if any, to the sanction
terms/loan agreement till full repayment of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction and also at the time of subsequent changes

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be specified in the loan agreements
controls.control_description:
(3) In cases of loan facilities with moratorium on payment of principal and /
or interest, the exact date of commencement of repayment shall also be
specified in the loan agreements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be specified in the loan agreements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured as and when such loans become due for renewal/review
controls.control_description:
In case of loans sanctioned before December 31, 2021, compliance to the
instructions in paragraph 8 shall be ensured as and when such loans become
due for renewal/review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured as and when such loans become due for renewal/review

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply the following principles in respect of working capital accounts sanctioned by them: (1) ensure that drawings in the working capital accounts are
controls.control_description:
A bank shall apply the following principles in respect of working capital accounts
sanctioned by them:
(1) Ensure that drawings in the working capital accounts are covered by the
adequacy of current assets;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply the following principles in respect of working capital accounts sanctioned by them: (1) ensure that drawings in the working capital accounts are

controls.control_objective: To ensure be older than three months
controls.control_description:
(2) Stock statements relied upon by the bank for determining drawing power
should not be older than three months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be older than three months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as irregular
controls.control_description:
(3) The outstanding in the account based on drawing power calculated from
stock statements older than three months, shall be deemed as irregular.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as irregular

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed / regularised not later than three months from the due date / date of ad hoc sanction
controls.control_description:
Regular and ad hoc credit limits shall be reviewed / regularised not later than
three months from the due date / date of ad hoc sanction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed / regularised not later than three months from the due date / date of ad hoc sanction

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish evidence to show that renewal / review of credit limits is already on and would be completed soon
controls.control_description:
In case of constraints such as non-availability of financial statements and other
data from the borrowers, a bank should furnish evidence to show that renewal /
review of credit limits is already on and would be completed soon.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish evidence to show that renewal / review of credit limits is already on and would be completed soon

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as npa
controls.control_description:
Hence, an account where the regular/adhoc
credit limits have not been reviewed / renewed within 180 days from the due
date/date of ad hoc sanction should be treated as NPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as npa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a part of the borrower's principal operating account for the purpose of application of these directions
controls.control_description:
If the debits arising out of devolvement of letters of credit or invoked guarantees
are parked in a separate account, the balance outstanding in that account also
should be treated as a part of the borrower's principal operating account for the
purpose of application of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a part of the borrower's principal operating account for the purpose of application of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure flag a borrower account as overdue
controls.control_description:
A bank shall flag a borrower account as overdue, if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date, irrespective of the time of running such processes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to flag a borrower account as overdue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the sma or npa classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end proce
controls.control_description:
Similarly, classification of borrower accounts as SMA as well as NPA shall be
done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA
classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end process is
run.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the sma or npa classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end proce

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the asset classification status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date
controls.control_description:
Thus, the date of SMA / NPA shall reflect the asset classification status of an
account at the day-end of that calendar date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the asset classification status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be march 31, 2021
controls.control_description:
Illustration I:
If due date of a loan account is March 31, 2021, and full dues are
not received before the bank runs the day-end process for this date, the date of
overdue shall be March 31, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be march 31, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure get tagged as sma-1 upon running day-end process on april 30, 2021 i
controls.control_description:
If it continues to remain overdue, then this
account shall get tagged as SMA-1 upon running day-end process on April 30,
2021 i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to get tagged as sma-1 upon running day-end process on april 30, 2021 i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be april 30, 2021
controls.control_description:
Accordingly,
the date of SMA-1 classification for that account shall be April 30, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be april 30, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure get tagged as sma- 2 upon running day-end process on may 30, 2021 and if continues to remain overdue further, it shall get classified as npa upon runn
controls.control_description:
Similarly, if the account continues to remain overdue, it shall get tagged as SMA-
2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain
overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon running day-end process on
June 29, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to get tagged as sma- 2 upon running day-end process on may 30, 2021 and if continues to remain overdue further, it shall get classified as npa upon runn

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish appropriate internal systems to eliminate the tendency to delay or postpone the identification of npas, especially in respect of high value
controls.control_description:
A bank shall establish appropriate internal systems to eliminate the tendency to
delay or postpone the identification of NPAs, especially in respect of high value
accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish appropriate internal systems to eliminate the tendency to delay or postpone the identification of npas, especially in respect of high value

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix a minimum cut-off point to decide what would constitute a high value account depending upon their respective business levels
controls.control_description:
The bank shall fix a minimum cut-off point to decide what would
constitute a high value account depending upon their respective business levels.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fix a minimum cut-off point to decide what would constitute a high value account depending upon their respective business levels

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valid for the entire accounting year
controls.control_description: The cut-off point should be valid for the entire accounting year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valid for the entire accounting year

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that doubts in asset classification due to any reason are settled through specified internal channels within one month from the date on which t
controls.control_description:
The system should ensure that doubts in asset classification due to any reason
are settled through specified internal channels within one month from the date on
which the account would have been classified as NPA as per extant guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that doubts in asset classification due to any reason are settled through specified internal channels within one month from the date on which t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed by the bank
controls.control_description:
Responsibility and validation levels for ensuring proper asset classification shall
be fixed by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fixed by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement the following instructions to increasing awareness among the borrowers: (1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining
controls.control_description:
A bank shall implement the following instructions to increasing awareness among
the borrowers:
(1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining with
examples, the concepts of date of overdue, special mention account and
non-performing asset classification and upgradation, with specific
reference to day-end process;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement the following instructions to increasing awareness among the borrowers: (1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining

controls.control_objective: To ensure of posters and / or other appropriate media
controls.control_description:
(2) consider displaying such consumer education literature in its branches
by means of posters and / or other appropriate media;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to of posters and / or other appropriate media

controls.control_objective: To ensure make suitable disclosures in its notes to accounts as per the requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - financial st
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make suitable disclosures in its Notes to Accounts as per the
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks -
Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make suitable disclosures in its notes to accounts as per the requirements contained in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - financial st

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify a loan or an advance as a standard asset or a npa, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as a standard asset or a NPA, as the
case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify a loan or an advance as a standard asset or a npa, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify a loan or an advance as npa if any of the following conditions are satisfied: (1) interest and / or instalment of principal remain overdue fo
controls.control_description:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as NPA if any of the following
conditions are satisfied:
(1) interest and / or instalment of principal remain overdue for a period of
more than 90 days in respect of a term loan;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify a loan or an advance as npa if any of the following conditions are satisfied: (1) interest and / or instalment of principal remain overdue fo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be working or the borrower's financial position is satisfactory
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be working or the borrower's financial position is satisfactory

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable only to the following agricultural advances: (1) loans to individual farmers [including self help groups (shgs) or joint liability group
controls.control_description:
The asset classification norms specified at sub-paragraphs 24(5) and 24(6) shall
be applicable only to the following agricultural advances:
(1) Loans to individual farmers [including Self Help Groups (SHGs) or Joint
Liability Groups (JLGs), i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable only to the following agricultural advances: (1) loans to individual farmers [including self help groups (shgs) or joint liability group

controls.control_objective: To ensure include traditional / non- traditional plantations, and horticulture
controls.control_description:
(i) crop loans to farmers, which shall include traditional / non-
traditional plantations, and horticulture;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include traditional / non- traditional plantations, and horticulture

controls.control_objective: To ensure include traditional / non-traditional plantations and horticulture
controls.control_description:
(i) crop loans to farmers which shall include traditional / non-traditional
plantations and horticulture;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include traditional / non-traditional plantations and horticulture

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that while granting agricultural loans and advances, realistic repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows / fluidity with the bor
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that while granting agricultural loans and advances, realistic
repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows / fluidity with the
borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that while granting agricultural loans and advances, realistic repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows / fluidity with the bor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borrower-wise and not facility-wise
controls.control_description: Asset classification shall be borrower-wise and not facility-wise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borrower-wise and not facility-wise

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to be treated as npa / non-performing investment (npi) and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become irregular
controls.control_description:
All the facilities
granted by a bank to a borrower and investment in all the securities issued by the
borrower shall have to be treated as NPA / Non-Performing Investment (NPI) and
not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become irregular.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to be treated as npa / non-performing investment (npi) and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become irregular

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account for the purpose of treating an advance as npa or otherwise
controls.control_description:
The availability of security or net worth of borrower / guarantor should not be
taken into account for the purpose of treating an advance as NPA or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account for the purpose of treating an advance as npa or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be handled with care and without scope for subjectivity
controls.control_description:
The asset classification of borrowal accounts where a solitary or a few credits are
recorded before the balance sheet date should be handled with care and without
scope for subjectivity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be handled with care and without scope for subjectivity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as a npa
controls.control_description:
Where the account indicates inherent weakness on the
basis of the data available, the account should be deemed as a NPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as a npa

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish satisfactory evidence to the statutory auditors / inspecting officers about the manner of regularisation of the account to eliminate doubts on
controls.control_description:
In other
genuine cases, the bank shall furnish satisfactory evidence to the Statutory
Auditors / Inspecting Officers about the manner of regularisation of the account
to eliminate doubts on their performing status.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish satisfactory evidence to the statutory auditors / inspecting officers about the manner of regularisation of the account to eliminate doubts on

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as npa only when the government repudiates its guarantee when invoked
controls.control_description:
The credit facilities backed by guarantee of the Central Government though
overdue shall be treated as NPA only when the Government repudiates its
guarantee when invoked.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as npa only when the government repudiates its guarantee when invoked

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract asset classification and provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue for more than 9
controls.control_description:
State Government guaranteed advances and investments in State Government
guaranteed securities shall attract asset classification and provisioning norms if
interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue
for more than 90 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract asset classification and provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue for more than 9

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the record of recovery of the individual member and other aspects having a bearing on the recoverability of the advances
controls.control_description:
Asset classification of accounts under consortium shall be based on the record
of recovery of the individual member and other aspects having a bearing on the
recoverability of the advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the record of recovery of the individual member and other aspects having a bearing on the recoverability of the advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, arrange to get its share of recovery transferred from the lead bank or get an express consent from the lead bank for the transfer of its
controls.control_description:
A bank participating in
the consortium shall, therefore, arrange to get its share of recovery transferred
from the lead bank or get an express consent from the lead bank for the transfer
of its share of recovery, to ensure proper asset classification in its books.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, arrange to get its share of recovery transferred from the lead bank or get an express consent from the lead bank for the transfer of its

controls.control_objective: To ensure be retained as such upon implementation
controls.control_description: are classified as 'Standard' may be retained as such upon implementation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be retained as such upon implementation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded as 'standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan
controls.control_description:
Borrower accounts which may have slipped into NPA between the date of
occurrence of the calamity and implementation of the resolution plan, shall be
upgraded as 'Standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded as 'standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the criteria laid out in these directions
controls.control_description:
Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan, the subsequent asset
classification shall be governed by the criteria laid out in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the criteria laid out in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be classified as 'standard'
controls.control_description:
Accounts which are restructured under paragraph 32J to 32R of the Reserve
Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions,
2025 dated November 28, 2025, where a subsequent restructuring is
necessitated under the provisions of Chapter IV-A of the aforesaid Directions,
shall continue to be classified as 'Standard'.]
C.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be classified as 'standard'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be looked into at the time of statutory audit / concurrent audit
controls.control_description:
The current assets and their valuation shall be looked into at the time of Statutory
Audit / Concurrent audit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be looked into at the time of statutory audit / concurrent audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in cases of npas with balance of ₹15 lakh and above: (1) to enhance the reliability on stock valuations, stock audit at annual intervals by exte
controls.control_description:
To bring down divergence arising out of difference in assessment of the value of
security the following shall apply in cases of NPAs with balance of ₹15 lakh and
above:
(1) To enhance the reliability on stock valuations, stock audit at annual
intervals by external agencies may be considered in case of larger
advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in cases of npas with balance of ₹15 lakh and above: (1) to enhance the reliability on stock valuations, stock audit at annual intervals by exte

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued once in three years by valuers appointed as per the guidelines approved by the board of directors
controls.control_description:
(2) Collaterals such as immovable properties charged in favour of the bank
should be valued once in three years by valuers appointed as per the
guidelines approved by the Board of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be valued once in three years by valuers appointed as per the guidelines approved by the board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify non-performing assets further into 'substandard assets', 'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
A bank shall classify non-performing assets further into 'substandard assets',
'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify non-performing assets further into 'substandard assets', 'doubtful assets' and 'loss assets' categories, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure have well defined credit weaknesses that jeopardise the liquidation of the debt and are characterised by the distinct possibility that the bank will sustain some loss
controls.control_description:
An NPA classified as substandard asset shall have well defined credit
weaknesses that jeopardise the liquidation of the debt and are characterised by
the distinct possibility that the bank will sustain some loss, if deficiencies are not
corrected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have well defined credit weaknesses that jeopardise the liquidation of the debt and are characterised by the distinct possibility that the bank will sustain some loss

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as sub-standard and should remain in such category for at least two years of satisfactory performance under the renegotiated or reschedu
controls.control_description:
An asset where the terms of the loan agreement regarding interest and
principal have been renegotiated or rescheduled after commencement of
production, should be classified as sub-standard and should remain in such
category for at least two years of satisfactory performance under the renegotiated
or rescheduled terms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as sub-standard and should remain in such category for at least two years of satisfactory performance under the renegotiated or reschedu

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling
controls.control_description:
In other words, the classification of an asset should not be
upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling, unless there is satisfactory
compliance of the above condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded merely as a result of rescheduling

controls.control_objective: To ensure be some salvage or recovery value
controls.control_description:
An NPA classified as loss asset is considered uncollectible and of such little value
that its continuance as a bankable asset is not warranted although there may be
some salvage or recovery value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be some salvage or recovery value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be straightaway classified as a doubtful / loss asset as appropriate
controls.control_description:
An asset need not go through the various stages of classification in case of
serious credit impairment and such assets should be straightaway classified as
a doubtful / loss asset as appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be straightaway classified as a doubtful / loss asset as appropriate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as significant when the realisable value of security is less than 50 per cent of the value assessed by the bank or accepted by nabard at t
controls.control_description:
Erosion in the value of security shall be
reckoned as significant when the realisable value of security is less than 50 per
cent of the value assessed by the bank or accepted by NABARD at the time of
last inspection, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as significant when the realisable value of security is less than 50 per cent of the value assessed by the bank or accepted by nabard at t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be straightaway classified under 'doubtful category' and provisioning should be made as applicable to 'doubtful assets'
controls.control_description:
Such NPAs shall be straightaway classified
under 'doubtful category' and provisioning should be made as applicable to
'doubtful assets'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be straightaway classified under 'doubtful category' and provisioning should be made as applicable to 'doubtful assets'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ignored and the asset should be straightaway classified as loss asset
controls.control_description:
Further, if the realisable value of the security, as assessed by
the bank /approved valuers / RBI / NABARD is less than 10 per cent of the
outstandings in the borrowal accounts, the existence of security should be
ignored and the asset should be straightaway classified as loss asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ignored and the asset should be straightaway classified as loss asset

controls.control_objective: To ensure be either written off or fully provided for by the bank
controls.control_description:
It shall be
either written off or fully provided for by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be either written off or fully provided for by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded as 'standard' asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower
controls.control_description:
The loan accounts classified as NPAs may be upgraded as 'standard' asset only
if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded as 'standard' asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded from npa to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilitie
controls.control_description:
In case of borrowers having more than one credit facility from a bank, loan
accounts shall be upgraded from NPA to standard asset category only upon
repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit
facilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded from npa to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilitie

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
With regard to upgradation of accounts classified as NPA due to restructuring,
the instructions as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks
- Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be covered in the automated information technology (it) based system ('system') for asset classification, upgradation, and provisioning processes
controls.control_description:
Coverage of automation:
(1) All borrowal accounts, including temporary overdrafts, irrespective of
size, sector or types of limits, shall be covered in the automated
Information Technology (IT) based system ('System') for asset
classification, upgradation, and provisioning processes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be covered in the automated information technology (it) based system ('system') for asset classification, upgradation, and provisioning processes

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be covered under the system
controls.control_description:
A bank's
investments shall also be covered under the System.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be covered under the system

controls.control_objective: To ensure be configured in the system, in compliance with the regulatory stipulations
controls.control_description:
(2) Asset classification rules shall be configured in the System, in compliance
with the regulatory stipulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be configured in the system, in compliance with the regulatory stipulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be system based as per pre-set rules for various categories of assets, value of security as captured in the system and any other regulatory stipu
controls.control_description:
(3) Calculation of provisioning requirement shall also be System based as
per pre-set rules for various categories of assets, value of security as
captured in the System and any other regulatory stipulations issued from
time to time on provisioning requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be system based as per pre-set rules for various categories of assets, value of security as captured in the system and any other regulatory stipu

controls.control_objective: To ensure be system driven and amount required to be reversed from the income account should be obtained from the system without any manual intervention
controls.control_description:
(4) In addition, income recognition / derecognition in case of impaired assets
(NPAs / NPIs) shall be system driven and amount required to be reversed
from the income account should be obtained from the System without
any manual intervention.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be system driven and amount required to be reversed from the income account should be obtained from the system without any manual intervention

controls.control_objective: To ensure handle both down-grade and upgrade of accounts through straight through process (stp) without manual intervention
controls.control_description:
(5) The System shall handle both down-grade and upgrade of accounts
through Straight Through Process (STP) without manual intervention.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to handle both down-grade and upgrade of accounts through straight through process (stp) without manual intervention

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an ongoing exercise for both down-gradation and up-gradation of accounts
controls.control_description:
The System based asset classification shall be an ongoing exercise for both
down-gradation and up-gradation of accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an ongoing exercise for both down-gradation and up-gradation of accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the asset classification status is updated as part of day end process
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that the asset
classification status is updated as part of day end process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the asset classification status is updated as part of day end process

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be able to generate classification status report at any given point of time with actual date of classification of assets as npas / npis
controls.control_description:
The bank should also
be able to generate classification status report at any given point of time with
actual date of classification of assets as NPAs / NPIs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also be able to generate classification status report at any given point of time with actual date of classification of assets as npas / npis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted from system driven classification in certain circumstances, which are expected to be minimum and temporary
controls.control_description:
Exceptions to automation: Exceptions may be granted from System driven
classification in certain circumstances, which are expected to be minimum and
temporary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted from system driven classification in certain circumstances, which are expected to be minimum and temporary

controls.control_objective: To ensure be from automated classification and not from income recognition, asset classification and provisioning norms under these directions and shall be subj
controls.control_description:
These exceptions shall be from automated classification and not from
income recognition, asset classification and provisioning norms under these
Directions and shall be subject to the conditions specified below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be from automated classification and not from income recognition, asset classification and provisioning norms under these directions and shall be subj

controls.control_objective: To ensure resort to manual intervention / over-ride in the system based asset classification process
controls.control_description:
(1) A bank shall not resort to manual intervention / over-ride in the System
based asset classification process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to resort to manual intervention / over-ride in the system based asset classification process

controls.control_objective: To ensure to override the system classification, it must have at least two level authorisation
controls.control_description:
(2) In any exceptional circumstance where manual intervention is required
to override the System classification, it must have at least two level
authorisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to override the system classification, it must have at least two level authorisation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the board approved policy of the bank and preferably should be done from the centralised location and suitably documented
controls.control_description:
Such delegation of powers for authorising the exceptions
should be as per the Board approved policy of the bank and preferably
should be done from the centralised location and suitably documented.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the board approved policy of the bank and preferably should be done from the centralised location and suitably documented

controls.control_objective: To ensure have appropriate audit trails and subjected to audit by concurrent and statutory auditors
controls.control_description:
Further, any such intervention shall have appropriate audit trails and
subjected to audit by concurrent and statutory auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have appropriate audit trails and subjected to audit by concurrent and statutory auditors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the audit committee regularly
controls.control_description:
Detailed reports
of such manual intervention shall be placed before the Audit Committee
regularly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before the audit committee regularly

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain logs for all exceptions i
controls.control_description: (3) A bank shall maintain logs for all exceptions i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain logs for all exceptions i

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be stored for a minimum period of three years and not be tampered with during the storage period
controls.control_description:
These logs shall also
be stored for a minimum period of three years and not be tampered with
during the storage period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be stored for a minimum period of three years and not be tampered with during the storage period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be system generated
controls.control_description: These logs shall be system generated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be system generated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be updated back into the cbs automatically
controls.control_description:
System Requirements and System Audit:
(1) In case a separate application outside the Core Banking Solution (CBS)
is used as the System for NPA / NPI identification and / or classification,
the System must have access to the required data from the CBS and / or
other relevant applications of the bank and the borrower / investment
accounts shall be updated back into the CBS automatically, wherever
applicable, through STP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be updated back into the cbs automatically

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the business logic and other parameters / configurations of the system updated to ensure that the system based identification, classification, pr
controls.control_description:
(2) A bank shall keep the business logic and other parameters /
configurations of the System updated to ensure that the System based
identification, classification, provisioning and income recognition are
strictly in compliance with the regulatory guidelines on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the business logic and other parameters / configurations of the system updated to ensure that the system based identification, classification, pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be periodic system audit, at least once in a year, by internal / external auditors who are well versed with the system audit both on system parameters
controls.control_description:
(3) There should be periodic system audit, at least once in a year, by Internal
/ External Auditors who are well versed with the system audit both on
system parameters as also from the perspective of compliance to Income
Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning norms as per these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be periodic system audit, at least once in a year, by internal / external auditors who are well versed with the system audit both on system parameters

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the following baseline requirements while designing and maintaining the npa classification system: (1) data input
controls.control_description:
A bank shall adhere to the following baseline requirements while designing and
maintaining the NPA classification System:
(1) Data Input
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the following baseline requirements while designing and maintaining the npa classification system: (1) data input

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully captured and stored without truncation (for example: time stamp - with date and time, narration field, or any other text data captured)
controls.control_description:
(i) Data Input in the System by any means should be fully captured
and stored without truncation (For example: time stamp - with date
and time, narration field, or any other text data captured).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully captured and stored without truncation (for example: time stamp - with date and time, narration field, or any other text data captured)

controls.control_objective: To ensure check for data type validations, min/max value
controls.control_description:
Such validations,
among other things should check for data type validations, min/max
value, exceptions, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to check for data type validations, min/max value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effected only after authentication and authorisation
controls.control_description:
(iv) Data input shall be effected only after authentication and
authorisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effected only after authentication and authorisation

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be used under exceptional circumstances and such ids should be mandatorily mapped to the employee id of the user to fix accountability of the act
controls.control_description:
If there are any generic user-IDs used, it should only be used under
exceptional circumstances and such ids should be mandatorily
mapped to the employee ID of the user to fix accountability of the
activities carried-out under the generic ID.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be used under exceptional circumstances and such ids should be mandatorily mapped to the employee id of the user to fix accountability of the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include transactions / activities carried out by administrator accounts in the system
controls.control_description:
This shall also include transactions
/ activities carried out by administrator accounts in the System.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include transactions / activities carried out by administrator accounts in the system

controls.control_objective: To ensure have at least two individuals to complete the activity)
controls.control_description:
shall have
at least two individuals to complete the activity).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have at least two individuals to complete the activity)

controls.control_objective: To ensure seamlessly take into account all the facilities availed by a given customer (in case of advances) and all the instruments of an entity (where bank has
controls.control_description:
Such STP mechanism
shall seamlessly take into account all the facilities availed by a given
customer (in case of advances) and all the instruments of an entity
(where bank has made investments in an entity), maintained across
multiple systems of the bank without any manual intervention.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seamlessly take into account all the facilities availed by a given customer (in case of advances) and all the instruments of an entity (where bank has

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that the updated account status, including asset classification of the customer accounts, flow to the cbs automatically
controls.control_description:
Further, a
bank shall also ensure that the updated account status, including asset
classification of the customer accounts, flow to the CBS automatically, if
NPA classification process is performed outside CBS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that the updated account status, including asset classification of the customer accounts, flow to the cbs automatically

controls.control_objective: To ensure be avoided
controls.control_description:
(i) Any changes to the data, parameters from backend shall be
avoided.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be avoided

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for changes to the data items only through front end (from the application (for example: cbs) itself and not through the back-end database upd
controls.control_description:
The System should provide for changes to the data items
only through front end (from the application (For example: CBS)
itself and not through the back-end database update) after requisite
authorisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide for changes to the data items only through front end (from the application (for example: cbs) itself and not through the back-end database upd

controls.control_objective: To ensure be captured with specific user details in the system
controls.control_description:
Audit trails / logs of access, changes to any data,
parameters, if any, should be captured with specific user details in
the system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be captured with specific user details in the system

controls.control_objective: To ensure be duly approved at an appropriate level and documented
controls.control_description:
(ii) In case of exceptions in rare circumstances, such changes should
be duly approved at an appropriate level and documented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be duly approved at an appropriate level and documented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available to auditors to generate complete list of back-end access and changes made
controls.control_description:
Provision for Management Information System (MIS) report should
be available to auditors to generate complete list of back-end
access and changes made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available to auditors to generate complete list of back-end access and changes made

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made
controls.control_description:
(i) Provisions of audit trails / logs to capture details of mandatory fields
(that are essential to complete the transaction and essential to
identify the transaction for audit / forensic purpose in the future) of
all the transactions (financial and non-financial) shall be made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained for changing the master data
controls.control_description: (ii) Logs should be maintained for changing the master data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained for changing the master data

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be maintained
controls.control_description:
System
generated activity logs of the users with administrative privileges
should also be maintained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be maintained

controls.control_objective: To ensure be captured in the cbs or associated sub-system(s) / module(s) meant for npa / npi identification / classification of asset codes as per these directi
controls.control_description:
(6) System Generated NPAs: All parameters required for NPA / NPI
identification shall be captured in the CBS or associated sub-system(s) /
module(s) meant for NPA / NPI identification / classification of asset
codes as per these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be captured in the cbs or associated sub-system(s) / module(s) meant for npa / npi identification / classification of asset codes as per these directi

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for separate mis report capturing all parameters for npa / npi identification
controls.control_description:
It should provide for separate MIS report
capturing all parameters for NPA / NPI identification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to provide for separate mis report capturing all parameters for npa / npi identification

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available to the supervisors during their onsite supervisory visit(s) as per the requirements
controls.control_description:
(7) Test Environment: The existing test environment in the bank with dummy
data and functional logic similar to that of the product environment of the
System shall be made available to the supervisors during their onsite
supervisory visit(s) as per the requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available to the supervisors during their onsite supervisory visit(s) as per the requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required, inter alia, to perform sample transactions review to assess whether the solution adheres in complying with regulatory prescriptions in th
controls.control_description:
This shall be required, inter
alia, to perform sample transactions review to assess whether the
solution adheres in complying with regulatory prescriptions in the extant
environment for NPA / NPI identification as per applicability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required, inter alia, to perform sample transactions review to assess whether the solution adheres in complying with regulatory prescriptions in th

controls.control_objective: To ensure draw up their standard operating procedure (sop) for system based npa classification for usage by the operating staff
controls.control_description:
A bank shall draw up their standard operating procedure (SOP) for System based
NPA classification for usage by the operating staff.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to draw up their standard operating procedure (sop) for system based npa classification for usage by the operating staff

controls.control_objective: To ensure be initiated against the concerned bank
controls.control_description:
The adherence to these instructions will be examined as part of supervisory
assessment of a bank and in case of non-compliance, suitable enforcement
action shall be initiated against the concerned bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be initiated against the concerned bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure make provisions of 0
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make provisions of 0.25 per cent in respect of direct advances to
agricultural and SME sectors in the standard category and 1.00 per cent in
respect of advances to the Commercial Real Estate (CRE) Sector classified as
'standard asset'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make provisions of 0

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made
controls.control_description: 0.40 per cent of the funded outstanding on a portfolio basis shall be made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made in respect of all other loans and advances in the sub-standard category
controls.control_description:
A general provision of 10 per cent of total outstanding shall be made in respect
of all other loans and advances in the sub-standard category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made in respect of all other loans and advances in the sub-standard category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as follows: (1) 100 per cent of the extent to which the advance is not covered by the realisable value of the tangible security to which the bank h
controls.control_description:
The provisions in respect of doubtful assets shall be as follows:
(1) 100 per cent of the extent to which the advance is not covered by the
realisable value of the tangible security to which the bank has a valid
recourse and the realisable value is estimated on a realistic basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as follows: (1) 100 per cent of the extent to which the advance is not covered by the realisable value of the tangible security to which the bank h

controls.control_description:

the asset has remained doubtful, 20 per cent - 50 per cent of the secured
